violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on multiple milk low boy coolers. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026
